name: Gorilla Frys
text: You got it?

name: Player
text: Yeah! But it doesn't even have a blade, just lights. It looks like a toy.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Careful, boy!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: That's a holographic knife!

name: Player
text: How are you even supposed to fight with it?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: I don't know. Ask the developers.

name: Player
text: Who?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Never mind.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: This thing is broken. See it flickering?

name: Player
text: Yeah... So you're going to fix it, right?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Eh... If I fixed everything, why are you here?

name: Player
text: *Nods* Yeah... So I should...?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Exactly.

name: Player
text: Alright! Teach me how to do it, Master!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *Laughs* That's my BOY! *Pats your head*

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *Ahem* Anyway, as you might've guessed, this knife runs on code.

name: Player
text: Oooohhhhhhh...

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Yup. Everything in this place runs on code.

name: Player
text: Wait... Then what about you? You're not real?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Correct. Neither of us is real.

name: Player
text: What-

name: Gorilla Frys
text: As I was saying... your first lesson is going to be...

name: Gorilla Frys
text: VARIABLES!!!

name: Player
text: ...Vari what?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *Sighs* Variables.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Do you have a name?

name: Player
text: Yes, I do. Wait a minute...

name: Player
text: Why is my name 'Player'...?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Right! And that name points to YOU. Not your shoes, not your backpack... you!

name: Player
text: Uh... okay?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: That's basically what a variable is: a name that points to a value.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: That way, we can access the value easily instead of writing it over and over again.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Just like how your name makes it easy to identify you in a crowd.

name: Player
text: Oh! This is easy!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *Smirks* That's what the last one said.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Now he spends eternity trapped in the Realm of Bugs.

name: Player
text: Like... real bugs?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: No, dummy. Code bugs.

name: Player
text: Ohhh.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: For example: a = 5

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Here, 'a' is the variable, and '5' is the value.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Every line of code in the universe has something called syntax.

name: Player
text: Oh? Sounds fancy.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Sure does. Once you start coding, it'll sound like hell.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Syntax is basically grammar. It's the set of rules for writing code correctly.

name: Player
text: So... I can't just type whatever I want, wherever I want?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Nope. In our example, the variable goes on the left...

name: Gorilla Frys
text: ...and the value goes on the right.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: The '=' in the middle is called the assignment operator. We'll talk more about that later.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Whenever you assign a value, the variable goes on the left and the value goes on the right.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Got it?

name: Player
text: Zzzzzz...

name: Gorilla Frys
text: OI! WAKE UP!

name: Player
text: *Jerks awake* Oh yeah! Variables are names!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *Sighs*

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Alright. Time to try it yourself. Press K on your keyboard.
